name: @act-spec/example-notion-knowledge-base
description: Runnable example: a Notion-backed knowledge base sourced from a recorded API fixture corpus, transformed by @act-spec/adapter-notion, and emitted as ACT (Agent Content Tree) static artefacts via @act-spec/generator-core.
author: Jeremy Forsythe <jeremy@act-spec.org>

scripts.conformance: pnpm run build && pnpm run validate
scripts.test: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-notion-knowledge-base: example exercises end-to-end via conformance')"
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-notion-knowledge-base: lint covered by typecheck + conformance')"
